text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Vodka invites me to watch a so-called
hard-boiled movie at the theater.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: After the movie is over...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Sniffle... sob...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Ahhhh... That was so good! It's a damn
masterpiece!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
The main character and his best friend fought
their way to the top of the school—literally!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
And then when he went one-on-one with the top
of the rival school and they ended up becoming
friends... Wow!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I guess the best friends are the ones who push you
to fight with all you've got.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: I know my fiercest rival is the one I consider my clos... est...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: B-but I uh, not all my rivals are cool though! One of them's really annoying!
choice_data_list: (This... is about Daiwa Scarlet, isn't it?)

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Well, enough about that! What I'm tryin' to say
is...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Trainer... Don't ya think we should have a
one-on-one battle too?!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Am I wrong? Umamusume and their trainers have
to understand each other on a deep level, right?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
And there are some things you can only
communicate with your fists! So let's do this,
Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seems like that movie gave Vodka some...
interesting ideas. I understand what she's trying
to say, but it's not like we can actually fight each
other...
choice_data_list:
How about we fight with our legs instead—a
race.

How about we fight with our legs instead—a
race.
Then let's duke it out, heart-to-heart!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seems like that movie gave Vodka some...
interesting ideas. I understand what she's trying
to say, but it's not like we can actually fight each
other...
choice_data_list:
How about we fight with our legs instead—a
race.

How about we fight with our legs instead—a
race.
Then let's duke it out, heart-to-heart!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Huh? A race?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Ahahaha! Don't make me laugh!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: You? Challenge me? Are you out of your mind?!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Sorry, but you've got zero chan—

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Aaaughhh!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: H-hold on... What I just said...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
That's exactly what the guy in the movie said
right before he got his butt kicked!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
You know, the thug who took one look at the
main character and totally dropped his guard!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
If the same thing's happening here... Don't tell me
you're actually super fast?!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: ...Hah! A-all right. I guess you're on then.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
But not today! If you really wanna do this, you're
gonna have to wait!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Don't get the wrong idea! I'm not backin' out or
anything!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I just mean, I just think we've had our fill of battle
today after that movie... right?!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
So yeah, our fight's on hold for now! Let's head
back.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: And then I'll do some training! Just in case!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems like I've avoided the challenge for the
time being. Secretly relieved, I join Vodka for her
training.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Uhhh... What does that even mean?
choice_data_list:
...Like, we could hit each other with our best
compliments?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Whaaaaat?!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
C-com...pliments? No way! What's the point?
...And besides, that's not even a fight!
choice_data_list: You're right. Forget I mentioned it...
You're right. Forget I mentioned it...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I just blurted out the first thing that came to
mind, so I try to change the subject. But...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
...But I guess, you're on. I'm tough enough to take
a few.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I-I mean if you need to get 'em outta your system,
go ahead and fire away.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I'll be fine. A real bud isn't afraid to take a fall for
a friend. So hit me with your best shot!
choice_data_list: Okay... I'll give it a try then.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Y-yeah! C-come at me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so I list out all the good things I've noticed
about Vodka since I met her, until...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Okay! Okay, okay, okay, okay! That's enough,
already!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After compliment number fifty or so, she suddenly
stops me.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
C'mon, how many do you have?! This is so
embarrassin', you're gonna make me pass out!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Aughhh! I said knock it off, already!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Geez. How many even was that? You're wack...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: What?! I have to do it too?!
choice_data_list: It's a one-on-one fight, isn't it?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Gulp!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Fine. It's not like me to just take a beating! Give
me a sec, I'll take ya down in one blow!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: The thing about... you... is...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: You're... really nice!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Hyaaaah! You're supposed to be embarrassed,
dummy!
